# Requirements: YAxUnit MCP Test Runner + Autogenerated Tests (EDT)

**Defined:** 2026-03-06
**Core Value:** The agent can autonomously create and run YAxUnit tests inside EDT and use results to improve code.

## v1 Requirements

### Test Authoring

- [x] **TA-01**: Agent can create a `Tests` subsystem and new common test modules with required boilerplate, including `ИсполняемыеСценарии`
- [x] **TA-02**: Agent can generate YAxUnit test cases that use `ЮТест` assertions and data helpers
- [x] **TA-03**: Agent can update existing test modules (add/modify/remove tests) without breaking registration

### Test Execution (MCP)

- [ ] **RUN-01**: MCP tool `run_yaxunit_tests` supports filters by module, test, suite, tag, and context
- [ ] **RUN-02**: Tool runs against the project’s default infobase configuration (no external runner required)
- [ ] **RUN-03**: Tool returns strict JSON results with per-test status, duration, error, and report paths
- [ ] **RUN-04**: Tool performs preflight checks (YAxUnit present, registration found, run config valid) and returns deterministic errors

### Reporting & Diagnostics

- [ ] **REP-01**: Tool surfaces report artifact paths (JUnit/Allure/JSON where configured) and summary counts
- [ ] **REP-02**: Tool logs include `opId` and capture run output for later inspection

### UI Integration

- [ ] **UI-01**: UI command/button “Run YAxUnit Tests” triggers the MCP tool and shows a summary
- [ ] **UI-02**: UI provides access to last run logs/report locations

## v2 Requirements

### Advanced Run UX

- **UX-01**: Interactive test tree with selective run (module/method) in EDT UI
- **UX-02**: Fast re-run support with change detection and safe fallbacks

### Execution Scaling

- **SC-01**: Isolated infobase execution for parallel test runs

## Out of Scope

| Feature | Reason |
|---------|--------|
| Remote/CI runners | Local-only in v1; CI integration deferred |
| Non‑YAxUnit frameworks | Scope is strictly YAxUnit |
| Full test management dashboard | UI is a simple run command in v1 |
